zh.Flamborough, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾福藍波洛
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Constable於1420年出生在英國越可爾福藍波洛時，她的父親Sir Robert Constable VI35歲，母親Agnes Gascoigne35歲。她於大約1434年與Christopher Mayne在英國米德萊可倫敦結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.Flamborough, Yorkshire, England: 英国英格兰越可爾福藍波洛
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Constable于1420年出生在英国越可爾福藍波洛时，她的父亲Sir Robert Constable VI35岁，母亲Agnes Gascoigne35岁。她于大约1434年与Christopher Mayne在英国米德萊可倫敦结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Constable
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southeastern): occupational name for the law-enforcement officer of a parish, from Middle English, Old French conestable, cunestable, from Late Latin comes stabuli ‘officer of the stable’. The title was also borne by various other officials during the Middle Ages, including the chief officer of a household or court, or a military officer, and this may in some cases be the source of the surname.
Americanized form of Dutch Constapel, an occupational name for the chief gunner aboard a ship or in the garrison of a fort.

variants.name: Costabile
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Aldo, Antonio, Ciro, Nino, Agnese, Angelo, Duilio, Enrico, Ercole, Franco, Palma.
occupational name from medieval Greek kontostablēs ‘chamberlain’, from medieval Latin comes stabuli, literally ‘count of the stable’ (see Constable ).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Constable was born in 1420, in Flamborough, Yorkshire, England, her father, Sir Robert Constable VI, was 35 and her mother, Agnes Gascoigne, was 35. She married Christopher Mayne about 1434, in London, Middlesex, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Constable est née en 1420, à Flamborough, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert Constable VI, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Agnes Gascoigne, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Christopher Mayne environ 1434, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Constable 1420 in Flamborough, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Robert Constable VI 35 und ihre Mutter Agnes Gascoigne 35. Sie hat um 1434 in London, Middlesex, England Christopher Mayne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Constable è nata il nel 1420 nel Flamborough, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Sir Robert Constable VI, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Agnes Gascoigne, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato Christopher Mayne circa 1434, nel London, Middlesex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia.

ja.London, Middlesex, England: イギリスミッドレセックスロンドン
ja.Flamborough, Yorkshire, England: イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアフランボロウ
ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Constableが1420年にイギリスヨークシュアイアフランボロウで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Constable VIは35歳，母Agnes Gascoigneは35歳であった。約1434年にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンでChristopher Mayneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Constable(이)가 1420년 영국 요르크실르 플램루에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert Constable VI(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Gascoigne(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 대략 1434년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 Christopher Mayne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

mn.Flamborough, Yorkshire, England: Flamborough, Eoferwic, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Constable nasceu em 1420, em Flamborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert Constable VI, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Gascoigne, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com Christopher Mayne aproximadamente 1434, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Constable родилась в 1420 г. в местности флэмбороую, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Robert Constable VI было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Gascoigne, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Christopher Mayne около 1434 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Constable nació en 1420, en Flamborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Robert Constable VI, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Agnes Gascoigne, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Christopher Mayne aproximadamente 1434, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija.
